title: diplazium induratum
intro: Diplazium induratum, also known as the hard shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to benefit the skin, respiratory system, and digestive system. Herbal preparations of Diplazium induratum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations.
